concerns.text: Task T017 references [FR-010] ('Implement physical validity filter'), but the spec.md Requirements section only defines requirements up to FR-008. FR-010 is undefined, leaving the 'physical energy minimization check' requirement untracked and potentially unimplemented.

Task T037 references [FR-009] ('Implement Variance Inflation Factor'), but the spec.md Requirements section only defines requirements up to FR-008. FR-009 is undefined, leaving the VIF check requirement untracked.

Task T015 implements 'distance-based cutoff logic' and 'connectivity check'. While this covers the logic for FR-001, there is no explicit task tagged [FR-001] or clearly described as 'Generate atomic connectivity network realizations' that covers the full scope of FR-001 (including the 95% connectedness target) as a distinct deliverable, relying instead on T018 (ensemble loop) which is tagged [US1] but not explicitly linked to the specific FR-001 success metric in the task description.

Task T047, T048, T049, T050 are 'Revision Tasks' addressing contradictions in spec.md and plan.md (branch names, force constants, formatting). These tasks modify the *specification* and *plan* artifacts, not the implementation code. While necessary for consistency, they are not 'implementation tasks' for the feature itself and should be resolved in the upstream artifacts before the tasks.md is finalized, or clearly marked as 'Documentation/Spec Update' rather than implementation tasks.
